affiliate.title: Become an Affiliate
affiliate.subtitle: Promote onebuzz apps and earn performance-based rewards.
affiliate.intro: onebuzz is looking for affiliates to introduce our diagnosis, fitness, and health apps. Joining is free — earn rewards based on the users you refer from your media or social channels.
affiliate.point1Body: You earn rewards for referrals that lead to sign-ups and usage.
affiliate.point2Body: A lineup of free apps that resonate with a wide audience.
affiliate.point3Body: Just register on our partner site and get your links instantly.
affiliate.note: Registration takes place on our external partner site.
